title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #3, Usopp as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Is building a ship for us !!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Once again, Luffy and the others

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to seeing the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: we have only a tiny bit left!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It was really fun. Aha- hahaha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fufufu... let's go look for bargains.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: While waiting five days for Franky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thanks for treating me to Mizu-mizu candy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's all right. I got 10,000 beri.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thanks, sir. You've got good eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Of course, I am the best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't do anything without me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, chopper, the weather's nice today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and just blend in with the crowd.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You guys love me too much.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What the heck is that idiot doing...?

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.
